trigger_condition.formula: Converted T = Starting Equity + T - (Largest Loss / -f)
trigger_condition.note: Threshold is dynamically calculated per cycle; increase contract count when equity ≥ Converted T

sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: scale up contracts when account equity reaches the Converted T threshold. Optimal f = 0.25 applied to largest historical loss. This is a step-wise leverage increase rule tied to equity milestones, not continuous scaling.

source_rule_text: Increase position size (number of contracts) when account equity reaches a calculated threshold based on starting equity, largest loss, and optimal f value.
